home.headline: A Free Network for a Free World
home.subheadline: SunLionet is a decentralized, open-source platform for secure communication, uncensored information, and digital freedom.

manifest.title: Manifest
manifest.intro: SunLionet is built on a simple belief: access to information and the ability to communicate freely are fundamental human rights.
body: In many parts of the world, these rights are restricted. Information is filtered. Communication is monitored. Voices are silenced.
We are building a decentralized, open-source ecosystem that allows people to:
manifest.dedication: This project is especially dedicated to those who live under restrictions — including the people of Iran.
closing: We do not speak for anyone.
We build tools so everyone can speak for themselves.

technology.title: Technology
technology.subtitle: A simple explanation of what SunLionet aims to provide.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Privacy and safety are core design goals.

community.title: Community
community.intro: SunLionet is an open project. Anyone can contribute.
